final:
module up_down_counter (
  input clk,
  input reset,
  input enable,
  input up_down,
  output reg [2:0] count);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) count <= 3'b000;
    else if (enable) count <= up_down ? count + 1 : count - 1;
end

endmodule
